summary: Admin Page URL Routing - All Features Working. Tested URL-based state persistence for admin sections, tabs, pages, and search. Refresh stays on same page, direct URL access works, returnUrl preserves state after login redirect.

minor.issue: Browser back/forward navigation goes to login page instead of previous admin section. This is because setSearchParams uses { replace: true } which replaces history instead of pushing new entries.
minor.suggestion: For section changes (major navigation), use replace: false to enable proper browser history navigation

critical_code_review_comments: URL-based state management implemented correctly using React Router's useSearchParams
ProtectedRoute correctly saves returnUrl including all query params when redirecting to login
LoginPage correctly reads returnUrl and redirects back after successful login
AdminTransfersQueue and AdminCardRequestsQueue read/write URL params for tab, page, pageSize, search
State syncs with URL on component mount (getInitialTab, getInitialPage, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin page URL routing fully tested. All features working: refresh persists state, direct URL access works with login redirect, deep linking works after logout/login cycle. Minor issue: browser back/forward doesn't work for section changes due to replace: true in setSearchParams calls.

refresh_persists_state: ✅ Transfers Queue -> REJECTED tab -> Refresh: Stays on REJECTED tab (URL: /admin?section=ledger&tab=REJECTED)
✅ Transfers Queue -> REJECTED tab -> Page 2 -> Refresh: Stays on page 2 (URL: /admin?section=ledger&tab=REJECTED&page=2)
✅ Search query persists after refresh (URL includes search=<query>)
direct_url_access: ✅ /admin?section=ledger&tab=REJECTED redirects to login with returnUrl, then back to correct page after login
✅ All URL params (section, tab, page, search) preserved in returnUrl encoding
url_updates_on_navigation: ✅ Clicking sidebar section updates URL with section param
✅ Clicking tab updates URL with tab param
✅ Pagination updates URL with page param
✅ Search input updates URL with search param (debounced)
deep_link_after_logout: ✅ Logout -> Access /admin?section=ledger&tab=COMPLETED&page=2 -> Login -> Returns to exact deep link page
browser_back_forward: ⚠️ Browser back/forward goes to login page instead of previous section (due to replace: true)
This is a minor issue as most users use sidebar navigation, not browser buttons
